title: symphyotrichum regnellii
intro: Symphyotrichum regnellii, also known as Rengell's aster, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. Symphyotrichum regnellii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
